# NeuroAD — Aligned Execution Plan (auto-generated by ultracode audit)

## North Star
Ship a runnable, open-source "scientific referee" that a judge trusts on close inspection: it visibly and correctly refuses confounded imaging claims — including our own — anchored on a REAL, reproducible scanner/site-leakage finding, dramatized by a deterministic autopilot demo, with every synthetic number badged and every citation verified.

## Positioning
Frame NeuroAD as a rigor-first auditor whose credibility IS the product: "watch the referee kill plausible-looking results, including ours." Impact (25%): the hero is the real, honestly-caveated batch-effect finding — frozen brain-FM embeddings leak scanner/site (AUC ~0.93 PCA-10 on 3,984 healthy OpenBHB brains) — a reusable finding/tool an Alzheimer's imaging researcher builds on, reproducible from a clean clone. Claude Use (25%): Claude is the adjudicator, not a chatbot — a three-voice courtroom (prosecution/defense/judge) that then critiques its own verdict, with strict structured tool-use and a verifiable LIVE transcript badged on camera. Never lead with beats that fail the tool's own gauntlet (the +0.04 synthetic survivor rescued by a fabricated p-tau217, or the OASIS brain-age collapse); the honesty of refusing them is the pitch. Drop "Proteins confirm it" entirely.

## 3-Minute Demo Plan
3-minute autopilot take, all served over http, presentation-mode on. [0:00-0:20] COLD OPEN on the badged SYNTHETIC HARNESS KILL cohort: a plausible-looking AD classifier, high naive AUC (~0.82) counts up. VO: 'This looks like a finding. Watch the referee.' [0:20-0:55] Run the gauntlet. The star leakage test: the pair-bar race — outcome bar fills, then the SCANNER bar races past it, margin flashes red/negative. The scatter MORPHS from color-by-outcome to color-by-scanner; centroids slide apart, the dominant ellipse rotates: the machine IS the axis. Verdict rubber-stamp SLAM + red flood: REFUSED, score 15. [0:55-1:25] Claude courtroom auto-expands: prosecution/defense/judge argue, then the reviewer critiques its OWN verdict — live-Claude badge visible, provably not a template. [1:25-2:00] Cut to the REAL finding: OpenBHB, 3,984 healthy brains, no disease. Frozen Neuro-JEPA embeddings predict scanner field strength at AUC ~0.93 (PCA-10); a bootstrap CI band snaps in and a permutation-null p is shown. VO: 'This is real, reproducible from a clean clone — `neuroad reproduce-finding`.' [2:00-2:25] SURVIVOR case as an explicitly badged MECHANIC demo: show the promotion gate and the biomarker anchor, every number stamped SYNTHETIC HARNESS. VO: 'This is how the molecular gate works — not a claimed result. We refuse to overclaim.' [2:25-2:45] Seed-sweep stability: 20 needles fan out and collapse into a tight cluster — 'verdict stable across 20 seeds.' [2:45-3:00] CLOSE on the export tray + one command `neuroad demo`: open-source, reproducible, and a referee that kills plausible-looking claims — including our own.

## Execution Sequence

- WAVE 1 (parallel, disjoint files): backend fixes the engine science on src/** (PCA-in-probe, bootstrap/DeLong CI + permutation null on leakage AUC & margin, brain-age two-way) — the numbers must change before anything is regenerated; qa verifies all prior-art citations via web search into scratch/CITATIONS_VERIFIED.md; design locks the corrected narrative spine in docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md and writes design/POLISH_SPEC.md; frontend does the video-legibility + presentation-mode pass on app/index.html (no upstream dependency).
- WAVE 2 (parallel, disjoint files): backend applies citation fixes + badges synthetic anchor + fixes evidence_ledger + reconciles docs-vs-artifacts + regenerates ALL reports under fixed logic + folds demo_data.json into `neuroad demo` + ships the PCA fixture and `reproduce-finding` + adds the live/offline badge and captures the live Claude transcript + emits seed-sweep data (src/**, reports/**, app/build_demo_data.py, docs/DATA_*.md, README, data/**); qa builds CI + packaging reconciliation on .github/tests/Makefile/requirements. Frontend and design stay OFF the demo-number work here to avoid animating stale content.
- WAVE 3 (parallel, disjoint files): frontend builds the autopilot + count-ups + scatter morph + verdict stamp + auto-expand courtroom + pair-bar race + seed-sweep panel on app/index.html, consuming the now-final demo_data.json; design prepares the recording environment and drafts the written summary/write-up. Backend is frozen except hotfixes surfaced by frontend.
- WAVE 4 (parallel): qa runs the final go/no-go verification (artifacts vs on-screen story, http serve, live transcript present); design records the final 3-min take and finalizes the 100-200 word summary once qa signs off.

## Workstreams


### Owner: BACKEND

- **[P0/S] Verify-or-delete every prior-art citation and reconcile docs-vs-artifacts: resolve arXiv:2604.14441 / 2606.09189 / Neuro-JEPA 2606.14957 / PathoROB to live DOIs (using qa's verification report) or remove them; fix the n=263 'Neuro-JEPA' substrate mislabel, the OASIS promoted flag, and the DATA_PROVENANCE 'PROMOTED' vs promoted:false contradiction; update DATA_ACCESS.md 'documented, not shipped' now that embeddings are shipped and add one provenance sentence on the CC-BY-NC-ND / gmail-gate access path.**
  - _why:_ A single unverifiable future-dated citation or self-contradicting artifact collapses the entire 'we productize published prior art' honesty frame for a tool whose whole value is rigor.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/calibration.py`, `README.md`, `docs/DATA_ACCESS.md`, `docs/DATA_PROVENANCE.md`, `reports/oasis.json`
  - _rubric:_ Impact 25% / Claude Use 25% / trust
- **[P0/S] Badge the biomarker anchor SYNTHETIC end-to-end and strike 'Proteins confirm it': mark p-tau217/GFAP as calibration targets (not measurements) in scoring/build outputs and cohort/report JSON, fix evidence_ledger.csv so the biomarker_anchor 'effect' column stops mislabeling the 0.5+|r| UI transform (0.904) as |r| and instead reports r with its Fisher-z CI, and add self-describing provenance columns (dataset, seed, source, n, ci_lo, ci_hi, SYNTHETIC flag).**
  - _why:_ The promotion gate rests on a fabricated correlation; an unbadged synthetic number in a downloadable artifact is a single-glance fabrication-liability the moment a judge pauses the frame or opens the CSV.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/scoring.py`, `app/build_demo_data.py`, `reports/evidence_ledger.csv`
  - _rubric:_ Impact 25% / Depth 20%
- **[P0/M] Reconcile the two tracks with PCA-in-probe on p>>n cohorts: add an automatic PCA/whitening front-end to LinearProbe selected when n<k*D, and make the gauntlet + leakage_margin use the SAME reduction the standalone neurojepa scripts already trust, so the shipped number is the defensible ~0.93 not the inflated 0.998.**
  - _why:_ Fixes the internal contradiction where the honesty_note distrusts the very 768-d AUCs (n=61-96) the engine ships, and yields the defensible number that is also license-safe to reproduce.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/probe.py`, `src/neuroad/gauntlet.py`, `src/neuroad/leakage.py`
  - _rubric:_ Depth 20% / Impact 25%
- **[P0/M] Put uncertainty on the headline numbers the demo says out loud: bootstrap/DeLong 95% CI + stratified label-permutation null on the leakage AUC and the leakage margin (honoring site groups), and report brain-age adjustment BOTH ways (predicted-brain-age AND Franke/Gaser brain-age GAP). Reframe near-threshold verdicts as 'margin CI excludes zero' / 'CI excludes chance' rather than point-estimate cutoffs.**
  - _why:_ Answers the imaging judge's inevitable 'is that margin significant?', converts verdicts from assertions to tests, and stops the over-aggressive brain-age control from silently killing a real signal — without boiling the ocean.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/gauntlet.py`, `src/neuroad/leakage.py`, `src/neuroad/probe.py`
  - _rubric:_ Depth 20% / Demo 30%
- **[P1/S] Add a seed-sweep verdict-stability computation (~20 seeds on the synthetic KILL and SURVIVOR) that emits the score distribution and verdict-flip rate into demo_data for the frontend 'stable across 20 seeds' panel.**
  - _why:_ Closes the single-seed fragility critique (Depth) and doubles as a cool-to-watch demo beat (Demo) — a rare two-rubric win.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/pipeline.py`, `app/build_demo_data.py`
  - _rubric:_ Depth 20% / Demo 30%
- **[P0/M] Fold demo_data.json generation into `neuroad demo`, regenerate ALL reports/*.json under the fixed scoring/CI/PCA logic, and ship a tiny checked-in PCA-reduced (10-d) frozen-inference feature fixture plus a `neuroad reproduce-finding` command that regenerates the leakage AUC from it (full 768-d tables stay git-ignored).**
  - _why:_ Makes the researcher-track finding runnable from a clean clone without violating CC-BY-NC-ND, and guarantees the workbench animates the engine's real output instead of a stale committed 87KB artifact.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/cli.py`, `src/neuroad/data/openbhb_jepa.py`, `data/real/fixtures/`, `app/build_demo_data.py`
  - _rubric:_ Impact 25% / Demo 30%
- **[P1/S] Make Claude visibly live: add a live-vs-offline model badge to CLI cards and report JSON printing the actual model/path used, replace the pipeline's bare `except Exception: pass` shims with debug-level logging, and capture + commit ONE real live-Claude courtroom+self-critique transcript to freeze as the demo's canned data.**
  - _why:_ The 'Claude as adjudicator' differentiator is 25% of the score yet currently unverifiable in a 100%-offline demo; a committed live transcript + badge makes it provably real without the recording depending on a flaky live call.
  - _files:_ `src/neuroad/claude/_client.py`, `src/neuroad/cli.py`, `src/neuroad/pipeline.py`, `reports/live_transcript.json`
  - _rubric:_ Claude Use 25% / Demo 30%

### Owner: FRONTEND

- **[P0/S] Video-legibility + Presentation-Mode pass (no upstream dependency, start day one): lift 10-11px mono microtext to 12-13px (lines 46,81,173,188-189), raise --mute/--ink3 to WCAG-AA on --bg, thicken canvas axis-label font (3680), and add a +12% presentation-mode toggle for recording.**
  - _why:_ On compressed 1080p/phone this decides whether the supporting AUCs, axis domains, and source chips 'hold up as software you trust' — the cheapest single-file lever on the 30% Demo weight, and a science-credibility fix.
  - _files:_ `app/index.html`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30%
- **[P0/M] Build the deterministic '▶ Cinematic Demo' autopilot: encode the corrected DEMO_SCRIPT beats as a timeline array [{t,fn,caption}] driving the existing selectCase/runGauntlet/toggleColor/toggleSubstrate/openSplit with a lower-third caption band, ?sub=&case= entry-state params matching the cold-open, and Esc/Space cancel back to manual (reuse clearTimers/S.timers).**
  - _why:_ The 3-min video is 30% of the score and currently depends on flawless manual keypresses against a script with no code counterpart; autopilot makes every take identical and on-narration, and doubles as a 'press play' artifact for judges.
  - _files:_ `app/index.html`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30%
- **[P0/M] Concentrated wow-fixes on the now-final numbers: eased count-ups (rAF easeOutCubic ~900ms) on the verdict score/leakage margin/naive AUC synced to the needle glide; a ~700ms scatter morph on color-toggle (lerp point positions + 1σ ellipse re-orientation so 'the machine is the axis' becomes a moving image); a verdict rubber-stamp slam + panel red/green color flood; and a CI band that snaps in beneath fragile numbers so uncertainty reads as craft, not omission. All honor prefers-reduced-motion.**
  - _why:_ These are the highest-ROI 'cool to watch' beats, but pointed at the defensible KILL-refusal and real leakage scatter — and the CI band pre-empts the 'is that significant?' attack instead of hiding it.
  - _files:_ `app/index.html`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30% / Impact 25%
- **[P1/S] Guarantee the Claude beat and stability panel on camera: auto-expand Courtroom + Reviewer at run-completion (remove default 'collapsed'), render the live-vs-offline Claude badge from demo_data, stage the leakage pair-bar race (outcome fills, scanner catches up ~400ms later, margin flashes red on negative), and add the seed-sweep panel (20 needles fanning into a tight cluster).**
  - _why:_ The self-critiquing adjudicator is the strongest Claude-Use (25%) narrative yet ships hidden behind a chevron; the pair-bar race is the leakage money-shot; the fan is the stability proof.
  - _files:_ `app/index.html`
  - _rubric:_ Claude Use 25% / Demo 30%

### Owner: DESIGN

- **[P0/S] Lock the corrected narrative spine and rewrite DEMO_SCRIPT.md: cold-open on the badged SYNTHETIC KILL (referee refuses a plausible-looking classifier), climax on the REAL OpenBHB leakage finding with the scatter morph, demote the SURVIVOR promote to an explicitly-badged demonstration of the gate MECHANIC (not a discovery), delete 'Proteins confirm it'. Produce a beat-by-beat timeline with exact caption text and timestamps.**
  - _why:_ Everything downstream (autopilot array, count-ups, recording) encodes this beat order; choreographing beats that fail our own gauntlet weaponizes polish against us, so the spine must be fixed and honest before any animation is built.
  - _files:_ `docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30% / Impact 25%
- **[P1/S] Write the frontend polish spec (design/POLISH_SPEC.md): exact count-up targets and timings synced to the 1.1s needle glide, the scatter-morph choreography (which centroids slide, which ellipse rotates), the verdict stamp/flood colors for REFUSED vs PROMOTED, the CI-band visual, and the seed-sweep needle-fan — as a spec for frontend to implement, NOT edits to index.html.**
  - _why:_ Keeps design and frontend on disjoint files while still giving frontend a precise visual contract; prevents concurrent edits to the single-file app.
  - _files:_ `design/POLISH_SPEC.md`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30%
- **[P0/M] Record the final 3-min take against the autopilot + presentation-mode over http (not file://), and draft the 100-200 word written summary + the repo write-up framing (lead with the leakage finding, the referee-refuses-its-own-claims thesis, the reproduce-finding command, and the live-Claude adjudicator).**
  - _why:_ The video is 30% and the summary/write-up carry the Impact + Claude-Use story; both must reflect the corrected, verified numbers.
  - _files:_ `design/SUBMISSION_SUMMARY.md`, `design/WRITEUP.md`
  - _rubric:_ Demo 30% / Impact 25%

### Owner: QA

- **[P0/S] Verify every prior-art citation against live sources (WebSearch/WebFetch) — arXiv:2604.14441, 2606.09189, Neuro-JEPA 2606.14957, 'PathoROB Nat Comms 2026' — and produce a verification report listing each as RESOLVED (with real DOI/URL) or UNRESOLVED→DELETE for backend to apply.**
  - _why:_ Citation verification is the load-bearing input to the honesty frame and must be done by someone with web access before backend edits calibration.py/README and before the summary is finalized.
  - _files:_ `scratch/CITATIONS_VERIFIED.md`
  - _rubric:_ Claude Use 25% / trust
- **[P1/S] Add a minimal GitHub Actions CI (pytest 75/75 + one offline `neuroad demo` smoke + `neuroad reproduce-finding` smoke), and reconcile packaging: move anthropic into the [claude] extra, fix the gated.py docstring that contradicts loaders.py wiring, add a Makefile `make demo`.**
  - _why:_ A green CI badge is an immediate open-source trust signal, and the packaging contradictions read as a hack to a careful reviewer (Depth 20%).
  - _files:_ `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `tests/test_reproduce_finding.py`, `Makefile`, `requirements.txt`
  - _rubric:_ Depth 20%
- **[P0/S] Final pre-record verification pass: confirm no shipped artifact contradicts the on-screen story (regenerated reports match demo_data, no promoted-flag/substrate/citation contradiction, evidence_ledger label fixed, no unbadged synthetic number), and that the demo serves over http with the live-Claude transcript present. File a go/no-go checklist.**
  - _why:_ A judge who clones the repo or pauses the frame must find nothing that undercuts the polished narrative; this gate protects Depth (20%) and Impact (25%) at the finish line.
  - _files:_ `scratch/GO_NOGO_CHECKLIST.md`
  - _rubric:_ Depth 20% / Demo 30%

## Risks / Hard Gates

- Regenerating reports/demo_data on top of unfixed engine logic wastes a pass and can ship contradictory numbers — hard-gate: no report regeneration until backend WAVE-1 science fixes land and change the numbers.
- Frontend animating a stale committed demo_data.json (87KB) or the file:// embedded fallback would record the wrong numbers — mitigate by folding demo_data write into `neuroad demo`, serving over http, and running frontend polish only in WAVE 3 after demo_data is final.
- A single prior-art citation that fails to resolve when a judge Googles it invalidates the whole honesty frame — qa must verify-or-delete ALL of them before the summary/README are finalized.
- The live Claude call could refuse or flake DURING recording — decouple: record against the deterministic offline path but freeze one committed live transcript + badge so the differentiator is verifiable without the take depending on a live call.
- Concurrent edits to the single-file app/index.html — enforce frontend-only ownership; design produces specs (design/*.md) and never edits index.html, backend never touches it.
- Chasing a new real AD cohort (MIRIAD/OASIS-3 DUA) 5 days out could consume the schedule and re-create the p>>n/no-CI traps — explicitly out of scope unless P0s land with days to spare, time-boxed to 1 day with a hard abort.
- A judge downloads evidence_ledger.csv and sees 0.904 labeled |r| contradicting its own r=0.40 detail — must be fixed before the export tray appears on camera.

## Out of Scope (deadline protection)

- Acquiring a new real AD cohort (MIRIAD self-serve or an OASIS-3 DUA) to get a survivor that clears both stars — L-effort data acquisition that risks the deadline and re-creates the statistical traps; reframe the thesis around the leakage finding instead. Stretch-only if P0s finish early, time-boxed to 1 day.
- Nested-in-fold covariate/brain-age residualization — correct but churns numbers repeatedly; document as a Limitation instead.
- Benjamini-Hochberg FDR across the 5 tests x up-to-6 clusters — defer to a Limitations/Future-Work note; the demo never surfaces the per-cluster gates.
- Probability-calibration reliability diagrams / Brier / ECE and renaming calibration.py — deferred; note honestly that calibration.py holds literature plausibility ranges, not probability calibration.
- Symmetric leave-one-site-out leakage-margin comparison and full bootstrap CIs on every gate — instrument ONLY the leakage margin + headline AUC + the two verdict scores the demo says out loud; rigor theater on unmentioned gates buys no judge points and destabilizes the take.
- Raising the replication n_test floor / deep replication-gate rework — low demo visibility; note the n>=6 caveat in Limitations.
- Tightening every bare except in the pipeline beyond the Claude shims — do the Claude-call logging only; broader exception hygiene is post-deadline polish.
